title: Szombie's Enchantment Glints
description: This resource pack lets you choose from a variety of enchantment glints with different colors for your enchanted items. Works with Vanilla Minecraft.
body:
[]()
# Szombie's Enchantment Glints

This resource pack lets you choose from a variety of Enchantment Glint textures for your enchanted items.

### (Requires 1.14+)

- Invisible enchantment glint is HIGHLY recommended for my Custom Items & Trident resource packs, because enchantment glints look glitchy on custom models!

## You can:

- Showcase the resource pack in any format if you credit me.
- Share the resource pack with the Modrinth link.
- Use the resource pack on any server.
- Modify the resource pack for private use only!
 

## You can't:

- Claim the resource pack as your own.
- Modify the resource pack for public use.
- Reupload any contents of the resource pack to anywhere.
- Showcase or share the resource pack without properly crediting the author.

### WARNING: If you disregard ANY of the above statements, measures will be taken to prevent any kind of theft! Thank you for understanding.

 

## ABOUT

### If you plan to use any of this in your own resource pack, contact me and we can get into agreement!

Szombie's Enchantment Glints resource pack overhauls the original Enchantment Glint Effect in different styles, originally made for my other Custom Item (CIT) / Custom Entity Model (CEM) Resource Packs.

 

## Styles:

- Invisible: The enchantment glint effect is removed from all enchanted items.
- Leviathan: The enchantment glitn is subtle, blurry, bluish enchantment glint made for my Leviathan Axe model.
- Lightning: The enchantment glint is imitating a lightning effect, made for my Mjolnir model.
- Fire: The enchantment glint resembles a fiery effect that is fading in and out constantly.
- Frost: The enchantment glint resembles a freezing, frosty effect that is fading in and out constantly.
- Cyan: The enchantment glint resembles a neon effect that is fading in and out constantly.
- Holy: The enchantment glint resembles a heavenly yellow effect that is fading in and out constantly.

 

## INSTALLATION

Place the chosen glint's .zip file in your resourcepacks folder, then move it to the top of your Resource Pack List in game! That's it!

 

## THANK YOU!

If you would like to support me, please consider subscribing to my YouTube channel. You also have the option to donate me on PayPal.

 

### I really hope you'll enjoy the resource pack! Have fun!
